description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: Green dial with hours, minute and seconds handStrap style: Silver-toned bracelet-style strap secured with a butterfly claspFeatures: 3 chronograph display, a screw to reset timeWater resistant up to 10 ATM, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 2 yearsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
